programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: A claimed lane-change dispute in Texas leads to a woman beating on a car that has a mother and four children inside; the tinted windows of a driver's sedan in California puts an officer at great risk.

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: A man unleashes a tirade at a female motorist after a rear-end collision in Florida. A worker servicing a stoplight over a road gets nailed by a semi in Louisiana. A gun-wielding sports car driver confronts a family in Florida. A motorcyclist gets clotheslined by a tow truck cable in Brazil. An Arkansas woman is flung from a three-wheeled trike into the path of an oncoming bus.

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: A woman's outburst in the street causes a roadblock in Maryland. A wreck on a Chicago highway leaves a trooper in the crosshairs of traffic. A driver in North Carolina ignores a warning about a sinkhole. Two semis collide in Texas when one turns left into oncoming traffic. A storefront crash in China is caused by a very unusual driver.

programme.title: Customer Wars
programme.desc: In a Florida neighborhood, police answering a call about an alligator loose in a neighborhood intercept a woman trying to deliver pizza to a customer. At a pro football game in L.A., trash talking between two women from opposite teams quickly turns into a massive brawl. Off the coast of a Colombian island, a couple of parasailing tourists are enjoying the view high above the ocean, when threatenin

programme.title: Customer Wars
programme.desc: In California, a customer confronts her food delivery driver after an issue with her order. In Flagler Beach, Florida, a belligerent bar patron squanders multiple opportunities to avoid arrest. A shoplifting accusation at a supermarket in London, England, spirals into a violent clash. And on a flight in California, passengers face an emergency evacuation when the cabin begins filling with smoke.

programme.title: Customer Wars
programme.desc: A passenger, allegedly unable to access the bathroom, causes a disturbance; a pilot calls police to deal with an unruly passenger; on a Nile river cruise, a man bargains from his balcony as vendors in a passing boat try to sell him souvenirs.
